name: Virtual Tee Systems
about: Virtual Tee Systems provides custom golf simulator installations for homes and commercial spaces across the lower 48 states. The company specializes in high-end simulator setups with a focus on luxury and customization, offering a range of launch monitors from premium brands like Trackman, Uneekor, and Foresight. Their service includes planning every aspect of the project from equipment selection to course integration, ensuring an optimal golfing experience. With headquarters in Denver, they are strategically positioned to deliver prompt and reliable service to clients nationwide.
why_golfers_like_it: Access to premium launch monitor technology for accurate shot tracking
Customizable simulator builds tailored to specific space and performance needs
Nationwide service coverage for convenient installation and support
Luxury-focused design creating an upscale golfing atmosphere

food_and_drink.notes: Home simulator bar setups can include kitchen facilities
Bar configurations available with home simulator installations

faq.question: Do I need my own clubs?
faq.answer: Clients need to provide their own golf clubs for use with the simulator installations.

faq.question: Can I bring food and drinks?
faq.answer: Yes, home simulator installations can be configured with bar and kitchen facilities for food and drink service.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Playing time depends on the simulator software and setup, but typically ranges from 1-2 hours for 18 holes.

faq.question: Is the facility kid-friendly?
faq.answer: The company installs simulators in homes that can be family-friendly, though specific amenities for children would depend on the custom configuration.
